tools.description: Add a track to the timeline stack (video, audio, text, or sticker overlay lane).
tools.name: add_track

parameters.description: Add a track to the timeline stack.

index.description:
Stack position (0 = bottom layer, composited first). Omit to add on
top of the stack.

kind.description:
Track lane categories the agent may create or target.

The engine has more kinds (effect / filter / adjustment lanes); they are
placeholders that render nothing today, so the agent cannot create them.

oneOf.description: Footage and other imported picture media.
Imported sound media.
Titles and captions.
Graphic overlays: solid colors and shapes.

parameters.title: AddTrack

tools.description: Place a trimmed range of an imported media file on a video or audio track. Times are in seconds.
tools.name: add_clip

parameters.description: Place a trimmed range of imported media on a video or audio track.

media.description: Media pool id of the source file.

source_duration.description: Length of the source range to use, in seconds.

source_start.description: In-point within the source media, in seconds.

start.description: Where the clip begins on the timeline, in seconds.

parameters.title: AddClip

tools.description: Place a generated clip (text title, solid color, or shape) on a matching track. Times are in seconds.
tools.name: add_generated

parameters.description: Place a generated clip (text, solid color, shape) on a matching track.

duration.description: Clip length on the timeline, in seconds.

generator.description:
The content to generate, as a tagged object — e.g.
`{"type": "text", "content": "Hello"}`,
`{"type": "solid", "rgba": [0, 0, 0, 255]}`, or
`{"type": "shape", "shape": "ellipse", "rgba": [255, 0, 0, 255]}`.

oneOf.description:
A title / text layer (rendered with the default style; styling is
preserved when replacing the text of an existing text clip).
A solid color fill covering the canvas.

rgba.description: Fill color as `[red, green, blue, alpha]`, each 0-255.

oneOf.description: A filled vector shape centered on the canvas.

height.description: Height in reference pixels. Omit to keep the clip's current size.

rgba.description: Fill color as `[red, green, blue, alpha]`, each 0-255.

shape.description: Geometry of a generated shape clip.

width.description:
Width in reference pixels (1080px-tall canvas). Omit to keep the
clip's current size when editing an existing shape.

start.description: Where the clip begins on the timeline, in seconds.

track.description:
Target track id. Text goes on text tracks; solids and shapes go on
sticker (overlay) tracks.

parameters.title: AddGenerated

tools.description: Replace a generated clip's content: change a title's text (styling preserved) or recolor a solid/shape. Not valid for media clips.
tools.name: set_generator

parameters.description:
Replace a generated clip's content (edit a title's text, recolor a
shape). Rejected for media-backed clips. Replacing the text of a text
clip keeps its current styling.

generator.description:
The replacement content, as a tagged object — e.g.
`{"type": "text", "content": "Hello"}`,
`{"type": "solid", "rgba": [0, 0, 0, 255]}`, or
`{"type": "shape", "shape": "ellipse", "rgba": [255, 0, 0, 255]}`.

oneOf.description:
A title / text layer (rendered with the default style; styling is
preserved when replacing the text of an existing text clip).
A solid color fill covering the canvas.

rgba.description: Fill color as `[red, green, blue, alpha]`, each 0-255.

oneOf.description: A filled vector shape centered on the canvas.

height.description: Height in reference pixels. Omit to keep the clip's current size.

rgba.description: Fill color as `[red, green, blue, alpha]`, each 0-255.

shape.description: Geometry of a generated shape clip.

width.description:
Width in reference pixels (1080px-tall canvas). Omit to keep the
clip's current size when editing an existing shape.

parameters.title: SetGenerator

tools.description: Change a clip's placement on the canvas: position, scale, rotation, opacity. Omitted fields keep their current value. Not valid on audio tracks.
tools.name: set_clip_transform

parameters.description:
Change a clip's placement on the canvas. Omitted fields keep their
current value. Rejected for clips on audio tracks.

anchor_x.description: Horizontal anchor within the content bounds (0 = left, 0.5 = center).

anchor_y.description: Vertical anchor within the content bounds (0 = top, 0.5 = center).

position_x.description:
Horizontal offset of the content center from the canvas center, as a
fraction of canvas width (+ is right; 0.5 puts the center on the
right edge).

position_y.description:
Vertical offset of the content center from the canvas center, as a
fraction of canvas height (+ is down).

rotation.description: Clockwise rotation in degrees about the content center.

scale.description: Uniform scale; 1.0 fits the content inside the canvas (100%).

parameters.title: SetClipTransform

tools.description: Crop a clip to a sub-region of its frame (fractions trimmed off each edge; 0 restores an edge) and/or mirror it with flip_h / flip_v. Omitted fields keep their current value. Not valid on audio tracks.
tools.name: set_clip_crop

parameters.description:
Crop a clip to a sub-region of its frame and/or mirror it. Crop values
are the fractions trimmed off each edge (left 0.25 removes the left
quarter); the kept region aspect-fits the canvas exactly like the full
frame did, so cropping never moves the layer. Omitted fields keep
their current value. Rejected for clips on audio tracks.

bottom.description: Fraction of the frame height trimmed off the bottom edge (0–1).

flip_h.description: Mirror the content left-right. Omit to keep the current state.

flip_v.description: Mirror the content top-bottom. Omit to keep the current state.

left.description:
Fraction of the frame width trimmed off the left edge (0–1). Omit
to keep the current value; 0 restores the edge.

right.description: Fraction of the frame width trimmed off the right edge (0–1).

top.description: Fraction of the frame height trimmed off the top edge (0–1).

parameters.title: SetClipCrop

tools.description: Add a visual effect to a clip's effect chain. Available effects: gaussian_blur (param 'radius'), vignette (param 'amount'). Effects render on the placed layer, in chain order. Not valid on audio tracks.
tools.name: add_effect

parameters.description:
Add a visual effect to the end of a clip's effect chain. Effects run on
the placed layer before it composites, in chain order. Use
`describe_project` to see a clip's current effects and their indices.
Rejected for clips on audio tracks.

effect.description: Effect id from the catalog, e.g. `gaussian_blur` or `vignette`.

parameters.title: AddEffect

tools.description: Remove an effect from a clip's chain by its index (0 = first). See describe_project for a clip's current effects.
tools.name: remove_effect

parameters.description:
Remove an effect from a clip's chain by its position (0 = the first
effect). See `describe_project` for the current chain order.

index.description: Index of the effect in the clip's chain (0 = first).

parameters.title: RemoveEffect

tools.description: Set a parameter of an effect on a clip to a value (e.g. gaussian_blur 'radius', vignette 'amount'). Use describe_project to see effect indices and current params.
tools.name: set_effect_param

parameters.description:
Set one parameter of an effect already on a clip to a fixed value. The
value is range-checked against the catalog. Use `set_param_keyframe`
with an effect param to animate it instead.

index.description: Index of the effect in the clip's chain (0 = first).

value.description: New value (clamped to the parameter's catalog range).

parameters.title: SetEffectParam

tools.description: Add a transition at the cut where a clip meets the next clip on its track. Available transitions: crossfade, dip_to_black, dip_to_white, wipe_left, wipe_right, wipe_up, wipe_down, slide. The clip must butt directly against a following clip. Not valid on audio tracks.
tools.name: add_transition

parameters.description:
Add a transition at the junction where `clip` abuts the next clip on its
track. `clip` must butt directly against a following clip (same track, the
next clip starts exactly where this one ends). Rejected for clips on audio
tracks and clips with no abutting neighbor.

transition.description: Transition id from the catalog, e.g. `crossfade` or `dip_to_black`.

parameters.title: AddTransition

tools.description: Remove the transition at a clip's right cut. See describe_project for which clips carry one.
tools.name: remove_transition

parameters.description:
Remove the transition at `clip`'s right junction. See `describe_project`
for which clips currently carry one.
parameters.title: RemoveTransition

tools.description: Set the duration in seconds of the transition at a clip's right cut (centered on the cut).
tools.name: set_transition

parameters.description:
Set the duration (in seconds) of the transition at `clip`'s right junction.
The window is centered on the cut.

seconds.description: New window length in seconds (must be positive).

parameters.title: SetTransition

tools.description: Add or replace a keyframe on a clip property (position, scale, rotation, opacity) at a timeline position in seconds, animating it over time. Use 'value' for scalar params, 'position' for position.
tools.name: set_param_keyframe

parameters.description:
Add or replace a keyframe on one animatable clip property, making the
property animate over time. The first keyframe on a property turns its
fixed value into a curve.

at.description:
Timeline position of the keyframe, in seconds. Must fall inside the
clip.

easing.description: Interpolation toward the next keyframe. Defaults to linear.

param.description: An animatable clip property the keyframe commands can address.

oneOf.description:
Canvas placement of the content center (vec2: use the `position`
argument, not `value`).
Uniform scale (1.0 = fit inside the canvas).
Clockwise rotation in degrees.
Layer opacity 0.0–1.0.

Audio gain envelope (0.0 = mute, 1.0 = unchanged, up to 10.0 boost).
Keyframing it draws volume automation; this is how you fade audio in
or out over time or duck music under a voice. Media-backed clips only.

position.description:
New `[x, y]` for `position` (fractions of canvas size from center,
+x right, +y down). Ignored for scalar params.

parameters.title: SetParamKeyframe

tools.description: Remove the keyframe at a timeline position (seconds) on a clip property. Removing the last keyframe freezes the property at that value.
tools.name: remove_param_keyframe

parameters.description:
Remove the keyframe at exactly a timeline position on one property.
Removing the last keyframe freezes the property at that value.

at.description: Timeline position of the keyframe to remove, in seconds.

param.description: An animatable clip property the keyframe commands can address.

oneOf.description:
Canvas placement of the content center (vec2: use the `position`
argument, not `value`).
Uniform scale (1.0 = fit inside the canvas).
Clockwise rotation in degrees.
Layer opacity 0.0–1.0.

Audio gain envelope (0.0 = mute, 1.0 = unchanged, up to 10.0 boost).
Keyframing it draws volume automation; this is how you fade audio in
or out over time or duck music under a voice. Media-backed clips only.

parameters.title: RemoveParamKeyframe

tools.description: Set a clip property to a fixed value and remove all its keyframes (stops its animation).
tools.name: set_param_constant

parameters.description:
Set one animatable property to a fixed value, removing all its
keyframes (stops the animation).

param.description: An animatable clip property the keyframe commands can address.

oneOf.description:
Canvas placement of the content center (vec2: use the `position`
argument, not `value`).
Uniform scale (1.0 = fit inside the canvas).
Clockwise rotation in degrees.
Layer opacity 0.0–1.0.

Audio gain envelope (0.0 = mute, 1.0 = unchanged, up to 10.0 boost).
Keyframing it draws volume automation; this is how you fade audio in
or out over time or duck music under a voice. Media-backed clips only.

position.description: New `[x, y]` for `position`. Ignored for scalar params.

parameters.title: SetParamConstant

tools.description: Change a media clip's playback speed (2.0 = double speed, 0.5 = slow motion) and/or play it in reverse. The clip's timeline length re-derives from the speed; its audio time-stretches to match (pitch preserved by default). Not valid for generated clips.
tools.name: set_clip_speed

parameters.description:
Change a media clip's constant playback speed and/or direction. The clip
keeps its timeline start and source footage; its timeline length
re-derives from the speed (a 2x clip takes half the time). Audio
time-stretches to match (pitch preserved by default; see set_clip_pitch).
Not valid for generated clips (text/solid/shape).

reversed.description:
Play the clip's footage backwards. Omit to keep the current
direction.

speed.description:
Playback rate multiplier: 2.0 plays at double speed (half as long on
the timeline), 0.5 is half-speed slow motion. Allowed range 0.05 to
100. Omit to keep the current speed.

parameters.title: SetClipSpeed

tools.description: Apply a CapCut-style speed ramp to a media clip so its speed varies across its length: preset 'ramp_up' (slow to fast), 'ramp_down' (fast to slow), 'montage' (fast/slow/fast), 'hero' (slow-mo on the action), or 'bullet' (fast/hard-slow/fast). Omit preset to clear the ramp. The clip's length re-derives from the ramp's average speed; its audio time-stretches along the ramp. Not valid for generated clips.
tools.name: set_speed_curve

parameters.description:
Apply (or clear) a CapCut-style speed ramp on a media clip: its playback
speed varies across its length following a named preset, instead of a
single constant speed. The clip keeps its source footage; its timeline
length re-derives from the ramp's average speed. The audio time-stretches
along the ramp. Not valid for generated clips.

preset.description:
Named ramp preset: "ramp_up" (slow→fast), "ramp_down" (fast→slow),
"montage" (fast/slow/fast), "hero" (dip to slow-mo on the action),
"bullet" (fast / hard slow / fast). Omit or set null to clear the ramp
back to a constant speed.

parameters.title: SetSpeedCurve

tools.description: Lock or unlock a retimed media clip's pitch. preserve_pitch true (default) keeps the original pitch while time-stretching; false lets pitch follow speed (the chipmunk effect when sped up). Only affects a clip that is retimed (speed change, reverse, or ramp). Not valid for generated clips.
tools.name: set_clip_pitch

parameters.description:
Lock or unlock a retimed media clip's pitch (CapCut "pitch" switch). When
preserved (the default), the audio time-stretches and keeps its original
pitch; when not, pitch rides the playback speed — the "chipmunk" effect on
a sped-up clip, a deep growl on a slowed one. Only affects sound on a
retimed clip (a speed change, reverse, or ramp). Not valid for generated
clips.

clip.description: The media clip whose pitch handling to set.

preserve_pitch.description:
True keeps the original pitch (time-stretch); false lets the pitch
follow the playback speed.

parameters.title: SetClipPitch

tools.description: Set an audio-lane clip's volume (0.0 mutes, 1.0 unchanged, 2.0 doubles) and/or fade-in/fade-out durations in seconds. Omitted fields keep their current value. For a video clip, target its linked audio companion clip.
tools.name: set_clip_audio

parameters.description:
Set a clip's audio mix: a constant volume gain plus linear fade-in/out
ramps. Volume 1.0 is unchanged, 0.0 mutes, 2.0 doubles (max 10). Fades
are seconds of ramp at the clip's head/tail. Audio lives on audio-lane
clips; for a video clip, target its linked audio companion instead.

clip.description: The audio-lane media clip to adjust.

fade_in.description:
Fade-in duration in seconds from the clip's start (0 removes the
fade). Omit to keep the current fade-in.

fade_out.description:
Fade-out duration in seconds ending at the clip's end (0 removes the
fade). Omit to keep the current fade-out.

volume.description:
Gain multiplier: 0.0 mutes, 1.0 keeps the recorded level, up to a
maximum of 10. Omit to keep the current volume.

parameters.title: SetClipAudio

tools.description: Duck music clips under voice/narration clips (sidechain): measures speech-band loudness on the voice clips and writes volume keyframes that dip the music while the voice talks, recovering in the gaps. amount 0..1 sets how far it dips (default ~0.66). Pass audio-lane clip ids for both lists. The result is ordinary, editable volume automation.
tools.name: duck

parameters.description:
Duck the music clips under the voice clips (CapCut sidechain ducking). The
editor measures how loud the voice clips are in the speech band and writes
volume keyframes that dip the music while the voice talks, recovering in
the gaps. The result is ordinary, editable volume automation on each music
clip. Target audio-lane clips by id (for a video clip with sound, its
linked audio companion).

amount.description:
How far to dip the music while the voice plays: 0.0 leaves it alone,
1.0 ducks to silence. Defaults to 0.66 (about a third of the level
stays).

attack.description:
Seconds for the music to dip once the voice starts (the "grab").
Defaults to 0.08.

music.description: Ids of the music / background clips to duck (at least one).

release.description:
Seconds for the music to recover once the voice stops. Defaults to
0.32.

voice.description:
Ids of the voice / narration clips that drive the ducking (at least
one).

parameters.title: Duck

tools.description: Split a clip at a timeline position (seconds) into two abutting clips.
tools.name: split_clip

parameters.description: Split a clip at a timeline position into two abutting clips.

at.description:
Timeline position of the cut, in seconds. Must fall strictly inside
the clip.

parameters.title: SplitClip

tools.description: Re-place / trim a clip to a new timeline start and duration in seconds. Trimming a media clip's head advances its source in-point.
tools.name: trim_clip

parameters.description:
Re-place / trim a clip to a new timeline range. Trimming the head of a
media clip advances its source in-point to match (like dragging a trim
handle).

start.description: New timeline start of the clip, in seconds.

parameters.title: TrimClip

tools.description: Move a clip to a track at a new start time (seconds), keeping its duration.
tools.name: move_clip

parameters.description: Move a clip to a track at a new start time, keeping its duration.

to_track.description: Destination track id (may be the clip's current track).

parameters.title: MoveClip

tools.description: Remove a clip, leaving a gap where it sat.
tools.name: remove_clip

parameters.description: Remove a clip, leaving a gap where it sat.
parameters.title: RemoveClip

tools.description: Remove a track and any clips still on it.
tools.name: remove_track

parameters.description: Remove a track and any clips still on it.
parameters.title: RemoveTrack

tools.description: Show or hide a visual track in the composite.
tools.name: set_track_enabled

parameters.description: Toggle whether a visual track contributes to the composite.
parameters.title: SetTrackEnabled

tools.description: Mute or unmute an audio track.
tools.name: set_track_muted

parameters.description: Toggle whether an audio track is silenced.
parameters.title: SetTrackMuted

tools.description: Lock or unlock a track's clips against editing.
tools.name: set_track_locked

parameters.description: Toggle whether a track's clips are editable (selection / move / trim).
parameters.title: SetTrackLocked

tools.description: Remove a clip and slide later clips on its track left to close the gap.
tools.name: ripple_delete

parameters.description: Remove a clip and slide later clips on its track left to close the gap.
parameters.title: RippleDelete

tools.description: Shift every clip on a track starting at/after a position by a signed number of seconds.
tools.name: shift_clips

parameters.description:
Shift every clip on a track that starts at or after `from` by `delta`
seconds (negative shifts left). Rejected if a left shift would collide
with an earlier clip or push a clip before time 0.

from.description: Clips starting at or after this timeline position (seconds) shift.

parameters.title: ShiftClips

tools.description: Insert a trimmed range of media at a timeline position, shifting later clips right to make room. Times are in seconds.
tools.name: ripple_insert

parameters.description:
Insert a trimmed range of media at a timeline position, first shifting
every clip at or after that position right to make room.

at.description: Timeline position of the insert, in seconds.

media.description: Media pool id of the source file.

source_duration.description: Length of the source range to use, in seconds.

source_start.description: In-point within the source media, in seconds.

parameters.title: RippleInsert

tools.description: Link two or more clips so they select, move, and trim together (replaces their previous links).
tools.name: link_clips

parameters.description:
Put two or more clips into one link group: linked clips select, move,
and trim together. Replaces any previous links on those clips.

clips.description: Ids of the clips to link (at least two).

parameters.title: LinkClips

tools.description: Drop a named, colored marker on the timeline ruler at a position in seconds. Omit color to cycle the palette.
tools.name: add_marker

parameters.description:
Drop a named, colored marker on the timeline ruler — an anchor for
navigation and for aligning edits ("cut at the marker", beat sync).

at.description: Timeline position of the marker, in seconds.

color.description: Flag color. Omit to cycle the palette automatically.

name.description:
Short label shown beside the flag (e.g. "Drop", "Beat 1"). Omit for
an unnamed marker.

parameters.title: AddMarker

tools.description: Remove a ruler marker by id.
tools.name: remove_marker

parameters.description: Remove a timeline marker.
parameters.title: RemoveMarker

tools.description: Move, rename, or recolor a ruler marker. Omitted fields keep their current value.
tools.name: set_marker

parameters.description:
Move, rename, or recolor an existing timeline marker. Omitted fields
keep their current value.

at.description: New timeline position in seconds. Omit to keep the position.

color.description: New flag color. Omit to keep the color.

name.description: New label ("" clears it). Omit to keep the name.

parameters.title: SetMarker

tools.description: Set the project canvas: aspect ratio preset ('auto' follows the footage; '16:9', '9:16', '1:1', '4:5', '21:9' reshape it) and/or the background color shown where no clip covers the canvas. Omitted fields keep their current value.
tools.name: set_canvas

parameters.description:
Set the project canvas: the aspect-ratio preset the composite renders
at, and/or the background color shown where no clip covers the canvas.
Omitted fields keep their current value.

anyOf.description: Canvas aspect-ratio presets the agent may pick.

oneOf.description:
Follow the footage: canvas shape and size derive from the largest
video media on the timeline (the default).

aspect.description:
Canvas aspect preset: "auto" follows the footage; "16:9", "9:16",
"1:1", "4:5", and "21:9" fix the shape (clips re-fit automatically).
Omit to keep the current preset.

background.description:
Canvas background color as `[red, green, blue]`, each 0-255. Omit
to keep the current background.

parameters.title: SetCanvas

tools.description: Get the current state of the project: tracks, clips with ids and times in seconds, the media pool, and the user's selection and playhead. Call this whenever you are unsure about ids or timing.
tools.name: describe_project
